page_subtitle: 15 years of high-stakes operational experience — from corporate project management to digital marketing strategy — applied to your freelance or small business. This is where we find the leaks and build the fix.
service1_desc: A deep-dive audit of your current workflows. I map the chaos, identify the leaks, and deliver a custom Implementation Roadmap showing exactly where to automate to save 10+ hours per week.
service2_desc: Full build-out of your operational infrastructure. I set up your systems, AI content agents, automated funnels, and client portals. You go from "messy" to "systematized."
service3_desc: I embed in your business as your Fractional Creative Operations Director. Ongoing strategy, team oversight, AI engine management, and all creative production. You lead — I run the machine.
callout_headline: My system saves your team 15 hours a week. That's hundreds of hours a year in reclaimed productivity — and real money back in your pocket.
callout_text: This isn't a Canva graphic. It's not a social media post. It's the operational infrastructure that pays for itself in less than two months.
